Interface SpawnerMinecart

All Superinterfaces:
BaseSpawner, CommandSender, Entity, Metadatable, Minecart, Nameable, Permissible, PersistentDataHolder, ServerOperator, Spawner, Vehicle
public interface SpawnerMinecart extends Minecart, Spawner
Represents a Minecart with an entity spawner inside it.
